close_reason: Fixed: path changed to Arc<PathBuf> in commit 4fb4e19
description: lib.rs:76 and lib.rs:110 each clone PathBuf for the spawn_blocking closure. PathBuf is Vec<u8>-backed, so each call is a heap allocation + memcpy of the path string. For a hot get-loop (e.g., a daemon checking secrets every second), this is wasted. Fix: store path as Arc<Path> in FileBackend and clone the Arc (refcount bump only). Trivial change with measurable benefit at scale; consistent with patterns elsewhere in the workspace where path-like fields are read repeatedly.
title: self.path.clone() on every get/refresh/put call allocates
